split_strategy: Temporal split: train ApprovalFY < 2005; validation 2005-2006; test >= 2007
intended_use: Pre-approval decision support for SBA-like MSME applications; human review remains mandatory.
limitations: Metrics are offline historical test results, not live repayment monitoring.
GrAppv is used as a proxy for requested amount because SBAnational has no application amount field.
The dataset is US SBA historical data and may not transfer directly to Malaysian borrowers.
Counterfactual results are model scenarios and do not guarantee approval.
